title: Delusional – I Killed a Man
full_description: A contemporary circus solo that embarks on a trans woman's journey through the haunting feeling of having murdered one's former self — a common experience for many trans people when leaving their assigned gender behind. Through a multidisciplinary repertoire of aerials, dance, singing and physical theatre, Diana Salles invites us to reflect on the physical and emotional strength it takes to honour one's truth.
ai_summary: Diana Salles's solo circus and physical theatre work — using aerial silks, song, and movement — explores the grief and liberation of a trans woman leaving her former self behind. Winner of the Brighton Fringe Best Physical Theatre Award 2025.
